title: ThaumcraftAltarCull
description: Culls TC4 Infusion Altar stabilizer blocks when not in use.
body:
Client mod which culls certain altar stabilizers when player is away from the altar, which should improve performance in bases with large infusion altar setups.

Infusion Altars with many Infusion Stabilizers create tons of lag due to the fancy rendering needed for Thaumcraft crystals and player heads. Even when the altar is behind a wall, looking in the general direction of it will cause tons of lag. This mod fixes this lag issue by skipping the rendering of these blocks when the player is not near the altar (configurable distance).
